name: Roasted Tomato Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. Place the tomatoes, garlic, chiles, and onion on a baking tray.
3. Tuck the garlic under other vegetables to avoid blackening.
4. Broil, turning frequently, until well charred, about 15 minutes.
5. Set aside to cool.
6. Transfer the roasted ingredients to a food processor fitted with the metal blade.
7. Puree with the water until smooth.
8. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Serve.
Makes 2 1/2 quarts
Store in the refrigerator for 3-5 days or in the freezer for weeks.
